reason: Approved MemoryManager allocation backend after explicit manager accounting; CEIC-021 evidence only and not transaction, visibility, security, recovery, parser, reference, WAL, benchmark, optimizer-plan, index-finality, or agent-action authority.
Approved MemoryManager rollback cleanup for a failed replacement allocation; it releases through the memory backend and does not create hot-path allocation authority.
Approved MemoryManager deallocation backend for previously accounted records; allocator evidence remains non-authoritative for transaction and recovery decisions.
Approved TypedArena placement construction into already reserved arena storage; no raw hot-path allocation authority is introduced.
Approved TypedArena placement construction for reserved array storage; construction does not allocate outside the arena.
Approved TypedArena metadata placement construction inside reserved arena storage for deterministic cleanup.
Approved TypedArena object placement construction inside a reserved slot; no direct heap allocation is performed.
Approved typed slab placement construction into reservation-backed slab storage; no raw allocator use occurs on the hot path.
Approved reservation-backed memory API handle construction after CEIC-011 ledger reservation; the handle owns governed release evidence.
Approved SizeClassAllocator factory construction inside the typed slab subsystem after reservation-backed policy setup.
Approved cache factory construction for the CEIC-014 thread-local per-core cache API; hot hits do not depend on raw allocation.
Approved RAII foreign-memory reservation handle construction after CEIC-011 reservation admission; no provider allocation is authorized by the handle.
Approved process-wide default MemoryManager installation mutex; it protects configuration only and is not an allocator hot-path dependency.
